prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement the database migration framework: the migration runner, the migration version tracking table, the SQL dialect abstraction (MySQL/Postgres/SQLite), and the migration rollback handling.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement the database migration framework: the migration runner, the migration version tracking table, the SQL dialect abstraction (MySQL/Postgres/SQLite), and the migration rollback handling.
